title: The Backrooms Pack
description: This resource pack retextures a lot of blocks to look like ones from the backrooms.
body:
![The Backrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1da5e94a2931f23c1f35f867f0eb728e41067222_0.webp)

This Pack Is Mostly For Mapmaking, and it has all the blocks for 5 levels, Level 0, 1, 2, Poolrooms, and Level Fun. With more blocks for other levels as well.

This is my best texture pack, and it has over 100+ Reskinned blocks / Items! It features everything from lights, to walls, stains, pipes, mushrooms, and more!

Check out the gallery, it has images of the pack!
